$comment: Closed controlled vocabularies for the canonical portfolio schema. Renderers read labels/order/icon/description from here — never hardcode. sync.mjs validates every project's category/status against these lists and fails loudly on unknown values. To add a category, see CONTRIBUTING.md governance rules (must be a recurring delivery type, >=3 expected projects).

categories.label: Data Analytics
categories.description: EDA, dashboards, BI, statistical analysis and data visualization.

categories.label: Machine Learning
categories.description: Modeling, prediction, training and ML pipelines.

categories.label: Data Engineering
categories.description: ETL, SQL, databases, orchestration and data pipelines.

categories.label: Web
categories.description: Websites, frontend and full-stack web applications.

categories.label: Backend
categories.description: APIs, services and microservices without a web UI.

categories.label: DevOps / Infra
categories.description: IaC, CI/CD, containers, cloud and monitoring.

categories.label: Automation
categories.description: Scripts, bots, tooling and homelab automation.

categories.label: Mobile
categories.description: Native and cross-platform mobile apps. (reserved — no projects yet)

categories.label: Library / Tooling
categories.description: Reusable packages, templates and developer tooling. (reserved)

status.label: Archived
status.description: Retired/frozen (auto-set when the GitHub repo is archived).
